name: http_request
description: Make an authenticated HTTP or HTTPS request with full control over method, headers, and body. Use when web_fetch isn't enough — e.g. POST to a REST API, send JSON with an Authorization header, call a webhook, or read a JSON API response. Returns status code, response headers, and body (auto-parsed as JSON if possible).

url.description: Full URL including protocol (http:// or https://)

method.description: HTTP method (default: GET). Common: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE

headers.description: Request headers as key-value pairs (e.g. {"Authorization": "Bearer token123"})

body.description: Request body — string or object (auto-serialised to JSON with Content-Type: application/json)
